notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, 8,000+ packs: normal V 11.63%, VMAX/VSTAR 4.42%, full-art V 1.98%, full-art trainer 1.42%, alt-art V 0.50% (all full/alt arts merged into ultra-rare), radiant 5.01%, Trainer Gallery 12.31% incl. gold-and-black VMAX 0.86% (reverse slot), rainbow 1.28%, gold 0.76% — hit rate ~32%. Rare-holo share (26.46%) from an independent 718-pack DigitalTQ sample, also used to split VMAX/VSTAR (VSTAR 3.16%, VMAX 1.26%). Residual mass on non-holo rare; reverse filler 50/50 common/uncommon. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. SWSH ETB contains 8 packs.
